{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_7","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python3 - <<'PY'\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom itertools import zip_longest\ntext=Path('/app/sequences.fasta').read_text().strip().split('>')\nrecs=[]\nfor block in text:\n    if not block: continue\n    lines=block.strip().splitlines()\n    id=lines[0].strip()\n    seq=''.join(lines[1:]).strip().lower()\n    recs.append((id,seq))\nfor id,seq in recs:\n    print(id,len(seq))\ninp=recs[0][1]; out=recs[1][1]\nfi=next((i for i,(a,b) in enumerate(zip(inp,out)) if a\"'!=b),None)\nprint('\"'fi',fi)\nif fi is not None:\n    print('inp',inp[fi-50:fi+120])\n    print('out',out[fi-50:fi+120])\n# compute diff ops via difflib\nimport difflib\nsm=difflib.SequenceMatcher(None,inp,out,autojunk=False)\nfor tag,i1,i2,j1,j2 in sm.get_opcodes():\n    if tag\"'!='\"'equal':\n        print(tag,i1,i2,j1,j2,'inp_len',i2-i1,'out_len',j2-j1)\n        print('inp_seg',inp[i1:i2])\n        print('out_seg',out[j1:j2])\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_25","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"node - <<'NODE'\nconst fs=require('fs');\nconst cp=require('child_process');\nconst txt=fs.readFileSync('/app/sequences.fasta','utf8').trim();\nconst recs={};\nfor(const b of txt.split('>').filter(Boolean)){\n  const lines=b.trim().split(/\\\\r?\\\\n/); recs[lines[0].trim()]=lines.slice(1).join('').trim().toLowerCase();\n}\nconst inp=recs['input']; const out=recs['output'];\nconst site=215; const ins=out.slice(site,site+(out.length-inp.length));\nfunction tm(seq){\n  const cmd=\"'`oligotm -tp 1 -sc 1 -mv 50 -dv 2 -n 0.8 -d 500 ${seq}`;\n  const o=cp.execSync(cmd,{encoding:'\"'utf8'}).trim();\n  return parseFloat(o);\n}\nfunction revcomp(s){return s.replace(/[acgt]/g,c=>({a:'t',c:'g',g:'c',t:'a'}[c])).split('').reverse().join('');}\nconst cands=[];\nfor(let lf=15;lf<=36;lf++){\n  const af=inp.slice(site,site+lf);\n  const tmf=tm(af);\n  for(let lr=15;lr<=36;lr++){\n    const ar=inp.slice(site-lr,site);\n    const tmr=tm(ar);\n    if(tmf>=58&&tmf<=72&&tmr>=58&&tmr<=72&&Math.abs(tmf-tmr)<=5){\n      cands.push({lf,lr,tmf,tmr,af,ar,f:ins+af,r:revcomp(ar)});\n    }\n  }\n}\nconsole.log('insert',ins,'len',ins.length);\nconsole.log('cands',cands.length);\n// sort by |tm diff| then avg closeness to 65 then shortest total\ncands.sort((a,b)=>Math.abs(a.tmf-a.tmr)-Math.abs(b.tmf-b.tmr)||Math.abs(((a.tmf+a.tmr)/2)-65)-Math.abs(((b.tmf+b.tmr)/2)-65)||((a.lf+a.lr)-(b.lf+b.lr)));\nfor(const c of cands.slice(0,25)){\n  console.log(\"'`lf ${c.lf} lr ${c.lr} tmf ${c.tmf.toFixed(2)} tmr ${c.tmr.toFixed(2)} diff ${Math.abs(c.tmf-c.tmr).toFixed(2)}`);\n}\nif(cands[0]){\n  const c=cands[0];\n  console.log('\"'BEST');\n  console.log('annealF',c.af);console.log('annealR_template',c.ar);console.log('F',c.f);console.log('R',c.r);\n}\nNODE\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
